---
name: Integration request
about: Request a new framework or SDK integration
labels: integration
---

**Framework / library**
Name and link to the project.

**Why is this useful?**
Who uses it and what monitoring would it provide?

**Existing tracing / callback API**
Does the framework have hooks we can attach to? Link to relevant docs.

**Are you willing to contribute?**
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to build this integration
- [ ] Yes, I can help test it
- [ ] No, just requesting
